name: codex-agent-skills
description: A personal product-building operating system for Codex, spanning product discovery, business viability, design, engineering, QA, and launch.

interface.shortDescription: Product, design, business, QA, and engineering workflows for building lovable apps with Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native product-building system. The plugin keeps a small command-like entry surface while loading deeper skills for discovery, founder review, business-model review, design review, specs, planning, implementation, QA, health checks, launch, retro, and learning.
defaultPrompt: Use design-plan-review before we build this UI.
Use ship to decide whether this is ready.
